account_settings_description: Update your personal information and password.
add_tenant_description: Create your company by filling out the form below.
dashboard_description: Select a company from the menu on the left to start managing your employees.
error_auth_url: Failed to get authentication URL. Please try again.
idp_description: Link an external directory to allow your employees to log in with one click and import their accounts.
idp_error_not_workspace: The connected Google account is not a Google Workspace account. Please use a Workspace admin account.
idp_required_sync: You must first configure an identity provider (IdP).
integrations_description: Connect the tools used by your company. We will automatically create your employees' accounts on these platforms.
login_description: Enter your email and password to connect.
name: Name
register_description: Fill in the information below to register.
register_success: Registration successful! You can now log in.
role_delete_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this role? This action is irreversible.
role_no_integrations: No integration connected yet. Connect one from the Integrations page first.
role_no_options: No roles defined yet. Create one from the Roles page first.
role_no_resources: No repositories available. Make sure the GitHub app is installed and has access to repositories.
role_projects_description: For each selected integration, list the projects/resources this role grants access to (comma-separated).
role_upsert_description: Name the role and choose which integrations it grants access to.
tenant_add_error: An error occurred while adding the company
tenant_add_success: The company has been successfully added!
tenant_delete_confirmation_instruction: To confirm, type "{name}" in the field below.
tenant_delete_confirmation_title: Are you sure you want to delete the company?
tenant_settings_description: Manage your workspace information and security connections.
user_delete_confirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this user? This action is irreversible.
user_secondary_email_description: Connection instructions are sent to the secondary email address.
user_upsert_description: Fill out the form below to add a new user to your company.
